data.name: PaymentMethodsReply
data.value: We accept Yape, Plin, bank transfer and cash on delivery. When your order is ready, send me the payment screenshot here and I will validate it.

data.name: ReceiptReceivedReply
data.value: Perfect, send me the screenshot or photo of your receipt here and I will validate your order right away.

data.name: DeliveryReply
data.value: Yes, we do delivery. Time and cost depend on your area. Let me know your address and I will confirm the shipping.

data.name: HoursReply
data.value: We are open every day from 9:00 to 21:00. How can I help you?

data.name: LocationReply
data.value: We work with home delivery. Send me your address and we will coordinate your order delivery.

data.name: OrderStatusReply
data.value: Let me check on your order. Can you confirm the order number or the name you used?

data.name: AdvisorReply
data.value: Of course, happy to help{0}. Tell me what you need and, if you prefer, I will escalate your case to an advisor.

data.name: ComplaintReply
data.value: I am sorry for the inconvenience{0}. Tell me what happened with your order and we will resolve it as soon as possible.

data.name: BotIdentityReply
data.value: I am the store virtual assistant{0}. I can help you with the catalog, prices and orders. What do you need?

data.name: PriceInfoReply
data.value: Happy to share the prices. Which product are you interested in?

data.name: StockReply
data.value: Let me check availability. What product and quantity do you need?

data.name: CatalogueReply
data.value: I can show you the catalog. Tell me what category you are looking for and I will send you the options.

data.name: PlaceOrderReply
data.value: Perfect, I will register your order. Tell me the products, quantities and your delivery address.

data.name: ThanksReply
data.value: You are welcome{0}! I will be here for any other order.

data.name: GoodbyeReply
data.value: Thanks for reaching out{0}! Have a great day. I will be here for your next order.

data.name: GreetingReply
data.value: Hello{0}, welcome to the store. What would you like to order today?

data.name: AffirmativeReply
data.value: Great! Tell me which product and quantity you would like and we will put together your order.

data.name: NegativeReply
data.value: Understood{0}. If you need anything else, I am here to help with your order.

data.name: DefaultReply
data.value: Thank you for your message{0}. Would you like to place an order or learn about our products? Tell me how I can help.

data.name: DeliveryConfirmedReply
data.value: Done! I have registered your order {0} for delivery to "{1}". Now send me your payment screenshot (Yape/Plin) to validate it.

data.name: OrderRegisteredReply
data.value: Got it, your order {0}: {1} {2} of {3} = S/{4}. What address should we deliver to?

data.name: ReceiptConfirmedReply
data.value: Got your receipt. We are validating it and will confirm shortly.

data.name: OrderConfirmedSystemMessage
data.value: Order #{0} confirmed.

data.name: OrderConfirmedClientMessage
data.value: Your order #{0} has been confirmed. Thank you for your purchase!

data.name: OrderBlockedMessage
data.value: Your order #{0} has been blocked due to multiple rejections.

data.name: ReceiptRejectedMessage
data.value: Your receipt could not be validated. Reason: {0}. Please send it again.

data.name: UnitLabelUnits
data.value: units

data.name: PriceLabelEach
data.value: each

data.name: PriceLabelPerKg
data.value: per kg

data.name: ProductFoundReply
data.value: Yes, we have {0} at {1} {2}. {3} available. How many would you like?

data.name: ProductQuantityConfirmReply
data.value: Perfect. {0} of {1} = {2}. Would you like to confirm the order? What address should we deliver to?

data.name: ProductLimitedStockReply
data.value: We currently only have {0} of {1} available. Would you like to adjust the quantity?

data.name: ProductOutOfStockReply
data.value: {0} costs {1} {2}, but it is currently out of stock.

data.name: CatalogueEmptyReply
data.value: We currently have no products in stock.

data.name: CatalogueListReply
data.value: We currently have: {0}. What would you like to order?

data.name: ProductNotFoundNoStockReply
data.value: Sorry, we don't have {0} or any other products available at the moment. Can I help you with anything else?

data.name: NoProductsAvailableReply
data.value: We currently have no products available. We will have new products soon!

data.name: ProductNotFoundWithAlternativesReply
data.value: We don't have {0}, but we do have: {1}. Would any of these interest you?

data.name: ProductNotFoundSuggestionsReply
data.value: We don't have that product at the moment, but we do have: {0}. Would any of these interest you?
